message:
Last winter, I found myself in a bit of a pickle when the forecast promised a major snowstorm. I usually underestimate these things, but this time, I decided to be the prepared one for once. I stocked up on essentials, filled the pantry with snacks, and even made sure I had plenty of blankets ready. When the snow started falling, I felt a sense of calm wash over me. Instead of scrambling at the last minute, I was cozy at home with hot cocoa, watching the world turn white outside my window. It was such a relief! 😊

Have you ever had a moment where you were finally prepared for something? What did you do to get ready?
